source_metadata.title: 2024/10/17 - Petitions
source_metadata.description:
17 October 2024 | Petitions Committee

Petition of Rhodes Farming Partnership: Undertake a parliamentary inquiry into virtual fencing; Petition of Entrust: Stop over taxation of Entrust dividend; Petition of Deb Hayes: Investigate Midwifery Council’s removal of ‘woman & baby’ from Scope of Practice

Submitters

Petition of Rhodes Farming Partnership: Undertake a parliamentary inquiry into virtual fencing

Rhodes Farming Partnership:
- Tim Rhodes

Halter:
- Charlie Baker, Head of Growth
- Steve Crowhurst, Partnerships Manager

Ministry for Primary Industries:
- Glen Burrell, Acting DDG Agriculture & Investment Services
- Carolyn Guy, Director Animal Health & Welfare
- John Roche, Chief Departmental Science Adviser

New Zealand Veterinary Association:
- Kevin Bryant, CEO, NZVA
- Kyle Kannan, Dairy Vets Special Interest Branch

Society for Prevention of Cruelty to Animals
- Dr Alison Vaughan, Scientific Officer, National Support Office

Petition of Entrust: Stop over taxation of Entrust dividend

Entrust:
- Denise Lee, Chair, Entrust
- Robin Oliver, Taxation Advisor

Inland Revenue Department:
- Paul Fulton, Principal Policy Advisor
- Bary Hollow, Principal Policy Advisor

Petition of Deb Hayes: Investigate Midwifery Council’s removal of ‘woman & baby’ from Scope of Practice

Midwifery Council:
Lesley Clarke, CEO, Midwifery Council
Kiley Clark, Co-chair, Tangata Whenua
Sue Kedgley, Co-chair, Tangata Tiriti
Jessica Schreiber, Registrar
